inputs.label: Solute Weight
inputs.businessContext: Mass of solute used in the solution, measured in grams.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of solute used in the solution, measured in grams.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çözeltide kullanılan çözünen kütlesi, gram cinsinden ölçülür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Masse des in der Lösung verwendeten gelösten Stoffes, gemessen in Gramm.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Masse de soluté utilisée dans la solution, mesurée en grammes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Masa del soluto utilizada en la solución, medida en gramos.

inputs.label: Molecular Weight
inputs.businessContext: Molecular weight of the solute substance, in grams per mole.

businessContext_i18n.en: Molecular weight of the solute substance, in grams per mole.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çözünen maddenin moleküler ağırlığı, gram/mol cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Molekulargewicht des gelösten Stoffes, in Gramm pro Mol.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids moléculaire du soluté, en grammes par mole.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso molecular de la sustancia soluto, en gramos por mol.

inputs.label: Valency (n-factor)
inputs.businessContext: Number of reactive units (equivalents) per mole; for acids, it is the number of H⁺ ions; for bases, OH⁻ ions; for redox reactions, electrons transferred.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of reactive units (equivalents) per mole; for acids, it is the number of H⁺ ions; for bases, OH⁻ ions; for redox reactions, electrons transferred.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mol başına reaktif birim (eşdeğer) sayısı; asitler için H⁺ iyonu sayısı, bazlar için OH⁻ iyonu sayısı, redoks reaksiyonları için transfer edilen elektron sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der reaktiven Einheiten (Äquivalente) pro Mol; bei Säuren die Anzahl der H⁺-Ionen; bei Basen OH⁻-Ionen; bei Redoxreaktionen die übertragenen Elektronen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'unités réactives (équivalents) par mole ; pour les acides, c'est le nombre d'ions H⁺ ; pour les bases, d'ions OH⁻ ; pour les réactions redox, les électrons transférés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de unidades reactivas (equivalentes) por mol; para ácidos, es el número de iones H⁺; para bases, iones OH⁻; para reacciones redox, electrones transferidos.

inputs.label: Solution Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of the prepared solution, in liters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total volume of the prepared solution, in liters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hazırlanan çözeltinin toplam hacmi, litre cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtvolumen der vorbereiteten Lösung in Litern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume total de la solution préparée, en litres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen total de la solución preparada, en litros.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
